creator: andrey@bsdnir.info
text:
Created attachment 164199
Update patch

After long break, the port has been updated to the newest version.

* now support wxPython 2.8 and wxPython 3.0 (pkg build with wx3.0)
* Updated to Operation Frostline 1.0 (item db version)
* now pkg NO_ARCH

option DPSGRAPHING related work (disable by default) need fix bug #196862 (wx2.8) or bug #205294 (wx3.0)
